caption: In a large, indoor ballroom with blue carpeting and ornate chandeliers, a group of practitioners performs synchronized martial arts movements. The central figure is dressed in a white traditional uniform, while others wear blue or black outfits. The group begins in an upright stance with arms raised, as seen in the first frame. As the sequence progresses, the practitioners transition into lower, more dynamic positions. By the final frames, they have dropped into deep lunges and wide stances, with their arms extended in coordinated striking or blocking motions. The background shows an audience seated at tables, watching the performance. The architectural details include gold-trimmed walls and large pillars. There is no visible on-screen text or logos. The scene evolves from a calm, standing posture to a series of powerful, grounded movements executed in unison across the room.
